overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy walking through a tropical tribal settlement with massive wooden structures during golden hour. The character traverses bamboo walkways, passes NPC villagers, and approaches a large central temple with red banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement entrance beneath elevated wooden platforms

events.description: passing under the ornate wooden archway into the settlement interior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and through the wooden archway, observing the elevated structures overhead

entered.detail: massive overhead wooden structure with hanging decorations and greenery growing on top
intricately carved wooden archway serving as entrance to the settlement
wooden lanterns and ornaments suspended from the overhead platform
lush green palm trees and vegetation flanking the entrance path
distant mountain range visible through the haze in the background

segments.scene_description: Aloy approaches the entrance of a tribal settlement dominated by a massive elevated wooden platform overhead. She walks beneath an ornate carved archway as the golden hour light filters through the clouds, illuminating the tropical vegetation surrounding the bamboo walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with bamboo walkways and scattered huts

events.description: passing by tribal NPCs walking along the bamboo pathway

agents.ego_description: navigating through the village center, passing by local inhabitants and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: tribal villager in green garments walking along the bamboo path

entered.detail: large decaying mechanical structure overtaken by vegetation
small thatched-roof dwelling on the right side of the path
snow-capped peaks visible in the distance beyond the village
bamboo railings lining the sides of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open village center, Aloy walks along bamboo pathways passing by a tribal NPC. The twisted metal ruins of ancient machines stand to the left while wooden huts dot the landscape, with mountains rising in the background under the warm sunset light.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bamboo trail with panoramic mountain views

events.description: sun becomes more prominent creating backlighting as camera turns toward the sunset

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated path toward the large central structure visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall multi-tiered wooden tower with thatched roofing serving as the settlement centerpiece
tropical banana plants with large green leaves lining the path
rustic dwelling built on stilts with woven walls

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues along the bamboo walkway as the sun begins to set behind the mountains, casting long shadows and warm backlighting. The path is flanked by dense tropical vegetation and wooden fencing, with the imposing central tribal tower growing larger in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central temple approach with large ceremonial structure

events.description: entering the central plaza area dominated by the large tribal temple structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the large central building, walking up the final stretch of bamboo pathway toward the entrance

entered.detail: large crimson fabric banners hanging from the temple structure
support structures and platforms built around the main building
carved wooden poles with decorative elements flanking the approach

segments.scene_description: Aloy approaches the massive central tribal temple, which now dominates the frame with its intricate wooden architecture and red banner decorations. The bamboo path leads directly to the structure's entrance as the golden hour light creates dramatic shadows across the weathered wooden surfaces and surrounding scaffolding.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tropical tribal settlement that transitions from a lush entrance into the shadow of a massive central temple during the golden hour. It begins as Aloy passes beneath an ornate carved archway, where warm light filters through clouds to illuminate the surrounding vegetation and bamboo walkways. As she moves into the open village center, the camera glides past tribal NPCs and twisted machine ruins, with the landscape expanding to reveal wooden huts and distant mountains under a deepening sunset. The scene then shifts as the path narrows between dense foliage and wooden fencing, with the sun dipping behind the peaks to cast long shadows while a towering tribal structure grows larger in the frame. Finally, the camera arrives at the imposing central temple, where the bamboo path leads directly toward intricate wooden architecture and red banners bathed in dramatic, low-angle light.
